channel.title: Analytics on robk.uk
channel.description: Recent content in Analytics on robk.uk

item.title: Solutions Architect: Databases in AWS
item.description: Associate-level extension of the Databases Section from AWS Cloud Practitioner Series.

item.title: Solutions Architect: Serverless
item.description: Serverless is a new paradigm in which the developers don’t have to manage servers anymore… They just deploy code…

item.title: Solutions Architect: S3
item.description: Associate-level extension of the S3 Section from AWS Cloud Practitioner Series.

item.title: Solutions Architect: RDS, Aurora, Elasticache
item.description: Associate-level extension of the Databases Section from AWS Cloud Practitioner Series.

item.title: Databases
item.description: AWS oﬀers a growing number of database options (15+) with diverse data models to support a variety of workloads. These include relational, key-value, document, in-memory, graph, time series, vector, and wide-column…

item.title: Amazon S3
item.description: Amazon S3 is one of the main building blocks of AWS. It is advertised as “infinitely scaling” storage…
